mapper.sql: FROM employee e INNER JOIN department d ON d.id = e.deptment_id AND d.dept_type = '临床科室' LEFT JOIN users u ON u.employee_id = e.id AND u.user_type = 7 WHERE ( NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM users ux WHERE ux.employee_id = e.id) OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM users uf WHERE uf.employee_id = e.id AND uf.user_type = 7) )
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT ON (e.id) e.id, e.deptment_id AS deptmentId, d.dept_name AS deptName, e.realname, e.delmark, u.id AS userId, u.username, u.status AS accountStatus
ORDER BY e.id, e.deptment_id LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT e.id, e.deptment_id AS deptmentId, d.dept_name AS deptName, e.realname, e.delmark, u.id AS userId, u.username, u.status AS accountStatus FROM employee e INNER JOIN department d ON d.id = e.deptment_id AND d.dept_type = '临床科室' LEFT JOIN users u ON u.employee_id = e.id AND u.user_type = 7 WHERE e.id = #{id}

SELECT DISTINCT ON (e.id) e.id, e.deptment_id AS deptmentId, d.dept_name AS deptName, e.realname, e.delmark, u.id AS userId, u.username, u.status AS accountStatus
ORDER BY e.id, e.deptment_id

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employee e INNER JOIN department d ON d.id = e.deptment_id AND d.dept_type = '临床科室' INNER JOIN users u ON u.employee_id = e.id AND u.user_type = 7 WHERE e.delmark = 0 AND e.realname = #{realname} AND e.deptment_id = #{deptmentId}
